sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Looking for Growth and Income? These 3 High-Yield Dividend Stocks Just Hiked Their Payouts Again.
feed.summary: This article highlights three high-yield dividend stocks—Oneok (OKE), Kinetik Holdings (KNTK), and Williams (WMB)—that have recently increased their payouts. These companies, operating in the pipeline and energy infrastructure sector, offer dividends yielding between 3% and 8%. The article emphasizes the benefits of dividend growth stocks for long-term investors, citing the companies' strong financial profiles and ongoing expansion projects as drivers for continued dividend growth.

feed.title: B2Gold stock dives as gold’s record slump rattles miners ahead of BTG earnings
feed.summary: B2Gold (BTG) shares plummeted by 11.7% following a significant gold sell-off, which also impacted other gold miners as the dollar strengthened. The market is now focused on B2Gold's upcoming Q4 and full-year 2025 results and its 2026 guidance, which will be released in mid-February, to assess the impact of gold's volatile performance on the company's outlook. Investors are closely watching whether gold prices will stabilize or trigger a further decline, as miners' profit margins are highly sensitive to these fluctuations.

feed.title: Halliburton Bets On NEX Lab To Turn Research Into Low Carbon Tools
feed.summary: Halliburton has launched the Next-Generation Energy Accelerators Joint Lab (NEX Lab) in Singapore, a collaboration with A*STAR, to focus on advanced well completion technologies and support energy transition efforts with low carbon solutions. This initiative aims to expand research and testing capabilities, attracting local talent and positioning Halliburton for future low-carbon opportunities, aligning with its existing narrative of embracing clean energy technologies and digital automation. The success of NEX Lab will depend on its ability to translate research into commercially viable offerings, shortening time to market for new completion technologies amidst execution and capital cost risks.

feed.title: Valero Energy’s Stock Tests Investor Nerves As Refining Cycle Wobbles
feed.summary: Valero Energy's stock has seen a recent dip despite strong quarterly earnings, raising questions for investors about whether this signals a deeper correction or a buying opportunity. The company's performance over the last year, including generous dividends, still shows a positive total return, yet the market is cautiously reassessing its near-term upside due to potential cooling margins and cyclical concerns. While Wall Street analysts generally maintain a "Buy" rating, there's growing sentiment that the best part of the refining cycle might be over, leading to a focus on cash returns rather than aggressive price appreciation.

feed.title: Is Newmont (NEM) Offering Value After Recent Share Price Pullback
feed.summary: Newmont (NEM) has experienced a recent stock price pullback but appears to be undervalued based on two different valuation approaches. A Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests a 31.4% undervaluation, while its Price/Earnings (P/E) ratio of 17.0x is below both its industry average and Simply Wall St's proprietary Fair Ratio of 26.3x. The article encourages investors to explore these valuation metrics and consider the company's financial story through "Narratives."

feed.title: Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOG) Identified as a Top Quality Investment by Caviar Cruise Screen
feed.summary: Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOG) has been identified as a top quality investment by the Caviar Cruise screen, a method for finding companies with strong financial characteristics and sustained growth potential. The company notably surpasses criteria for revenue and EBIT growth, boasts an impressive return on invested capital, and demonstrates strong financial soundness with high cash conversion. These factors, combined with non-measurable competitive advantages, position Alphabet as a robust long-term investment.

feed.title: Triggers That Could Ignite the Next Rally In Applied Materials Stock
feed.summary: Applied Materials (AMAT) stock has historically shown significant rallies, and key catalysts could propel it to new highs. These catalysts include acceleration in AI-driven DRAM and advanced packaging, unlocking recurring revenue from Applied Global Services (AGS) with margin inflection, and the launch of the EPIC R&D Center. However, potential risks such as cash flow contraction, an unresolved criminal probe, and escalating intellectual property battles in China could impact its performance.

feed.title: Fortive Corp. Stock Is Quietly Going Off – Is This Sleeper Tech Play Actually Worth Your Money?
feed.summary: Fortive Corp. is emerging as a "sleeper" tech-industrial stock gaining quiet attention among discerning investors. While not a flashy meme stock, Fortive offers steady growth through its "picks and shovels" approach, providing essential tools and infrastructure in industrial software, automation, and measurement. The company's focus on recurring revenue and stable business model makes it an attractive long-term option for those seeking balance between growth and stability.

feed.title: Lam Research stock price slides 6% into the weekend — here’s what LRCX investors watch next
feed.summary: Lam Research Corporation (LRCX) shares fell 5.9% on Friday, closing at $233.46, as investors assessed the company's outlook and upcoming market events. The decline reflects broader market caution and specific concerns about tariffs, export controls, and the competitive landscape for wafer fabrication equipment. Analysts are closely watching for how Lam's guidance on revenue and earnings, along with robust demand for high-bandwidth memory, will influence its stock performance next week, especially with key economic reports and earnings calendars approaching.
